name: The Memory About You
overview: Yan Xiaochen’s life shifts when she works at a bar and meets wealthy Cheng Jinyuan, causing tension with her boyfriend, Shen Hou. After graduation, Xiaochen faces a betrayal and flees to America, where Jinyuan supports her. As she grows closer to him, Shen Hou reappears, bringing new complications.

trailers.title: 【Official Trailer】Winter romance blooming in adversity🌱 | The Memory About You | Fresh Drama
